div.p: Memory access pattern: hot path optimization for sub-5μs latency

ul.li: Packet data NOT in any CPU cache

div.p: Key insight: 2 cache misses = 200ns = 4% of 5μs budget per miss = 40% of processing time
Prefetch distance: Start prefetch ~50 cycles before actual access to hide memory latency

g.text: // Each counter on its own cache line

div.p: False sharing penalty: 50-500ns per update when multiple cores write to same cache line even if writing different variables!

text.tspan: // Prefetch: next descriptor already in cache
// Prefetch: next descriptor already in cache

g.text: uint32_t hash = tcp_hash(src_ip, dst_ip, src_port, dst_port);

text.tspan: // Likely cache miss for cold connections
// Likely cache miss for cold connections

ul.li: Window state Cold fields last (rarely accessed):
Timer state Result: 1 cache miss for hot path instead of 3-4 with naive layout

text.tspan: // By time we get here, data is in cache
// By time we get here, data is in cache

div.p: Before: ~1500ns processing (6+ cache misses) After: ~400ns processing (1-2 cache misses) Savings: 1100ns = 22% of 5μs budget = room for application logic
